lesson.title: CAPS.Mathematics.Gr10.ALG.2: Solve linear, quadratic, literal, and simultaneous linear...
lesson.explanation: In Grade 10, you master factorisation — the reverse of expanding. Methods: (1) Common factor: take out the greatest common factor. (2) Grouping: group terms in pairs and factor each pair. (3) Trinomials: find two numbers that multiply to ac and add to b in ax² + bx + c. (4) Difference of squares: a² - b² = (a+b)(a-b). (5) Sum/difference of cubes: a³ + b³ = (a+b)(a²-ab+b²).

assessment.title: Assessment: Solve linear, quadratic, literal, and simultaneous linear equations. Solve linear inequalities and represent on number line

flashcards.front: What is the key idea in Equations and Inequalities?
flashcards.back: Grade 10 equations include linear equations, quadratic equations (solved by factorisation), literal equations (solving for a specific variable in a formula), and simultaneous linear equations (two equations, two unknowns — solved by substitution or elimination)
